creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: gerald
Date: Sun Mar  9 00:46:57 2014
New Revision: 347547
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347547
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347547/

Log:
  Update to version 1.4.3.  Adjust the URL in pkg-descr.  Sort pkg-plist.
  
  PR:		182301
  Submitted by:	lwhsu
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout (clsung, >5 months)

Modified:
  head/www/py-pyramid/Makefile
  head/www/py-pyramid/distinfo
  head/www/py-pyramid/pkg-descr
  head/www/py-pyramid/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/py-pyramid/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-pyramid/Makefile	Sun Mar  9 00:32:17 2014	(r347546)
+++ head/www/py-pyramid/Makefile	Sun Mar  9 00:46:57 2014	(r347547)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	pyramid
-PORTVERSION=	1.4.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.3
 CATEGORIES=	www python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}

==============================================================================
--- head/www/py-pyramid/distinfo	Sun Mar  9 00:32:17 2014	(r347546)

+SIZE (pyramid-1.4.3.tar.gz) = 2426125

 * Authentication support improvements
 * Documentation improvements
 
-WWW: http://docs.pylonsproject.org
+WWW: http://www.pylonsproject.org
